props.name: gridSize
props.description: Number of rows/columns in the pixel grid.

props.name: pixelColor
props.description: Background color used for each pixel block.

props.name: animationStepDuration
props.description: Length of the pixel reveal/hide in seconds.

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description: Sets the 'padding-top' (or aspect-ratio) for the container.

props.name: once
props.description: If true, the transition will not revert on mouse leave or subsequent clicks.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional additional class names for styling.

props.name: style
props.description: Optional inline styles for the container.
